name: Trackman at Beacon Hill
address: 6011 Majestic Oaks Dr, Commerce Township, MI 48382
about: Trackman at Beacon Hill is an indoor golf simulator facility located in Commerce Township, MI. It features 4 bays equipped with TrackMan iO technology, providing an immersive and accurate simulation of real golfing conditions. The venue offers hourly simulator rentals, allowing guests to practice, compete, and play world-renowned courses. A full-service bar and grill are available on-site, serving tap and bottled beer, cocktails, and light snacks daily, with a kitchen open Monday-Thursday. The facility also hosts fall/winter golf simulator leagues and is available for private parties and group events.
why_golfers_like_it: High-end TrackMan iO technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Flexible booking options with reservation and walk-in availability
Variety of on-site food and beverage options for a complete experience
Ability to play world-renowned golf courses from a comfortable indoor setting

food_and_drink.notes: Light snacks available all day, kitchen open Monday-Thursday 4pm-9pm, additional food options for groups of 16 or more
Full-service bar with tap and bottled beer plus cocktails available all day, every day

simulator_hardware.notes: 4 bays equipped with TrackMan iO technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but it is standard practice at simulator venues that guests bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue offers a full-service bar and grill with tap and bottled beer, cocktails, and light snacks available all day.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify, but typical simulator play allows for faster rounds than on-course golf, often taking 1.5-2 hours depending on pace.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility allows up to 6 guests per simulator and mentions accommodating families, with food options available for various group sizes.
